word: H2300 - חָדַד - châdad - khaw-dad' - Be fierce

sections.paragraph:
Original: חדד

Transliteration: châdad

Phonetic: khaw-dad'

BDB Definition:

  1. to be sharp, be alert, be keen
    1. (Qal) to be sharp, be keen
    2. (Hiphil) to sharpen
    3. (Hophal) to be sharpened

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 605

Part(s) of speech: Verb
